---
title: "David González Durán"
image: "images/profile_pic.jpg"
about:
  template: solana
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:davigdondur@proton.me
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/davgondur/
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/esdavide2910
    - icon: file-pdf
      text: CV
      href: documents/cv.pdf
---

Welcome to my portfolio!

## Bio

I am David González Durán, recently graduated in Universidad de Granada. 




Enthusiast of Machine Learning, specially as applied to **Computer Vision** and **Data Science**. I'm looking to start my career in a environment that allows me to develop challenging projects using **state-of-the-art technology**. I am motivated by the versatility of machine learning, enjoying process of exploring and applying these models in new fields. I am not afraid to dive into other areas of knowledge to make AI not just a promise, but a tool for **solving complex real-world problems**.

On this site I will keep a list of the...


## Academic background 



## Work experience



## Interests
 
- **DataViz**: Focused on advanced exploratory data analysis (EDA) and the design of visualisations that help us understanding data.

- **Trustworthy AI**: Interested in uncertainty estimation and explanaible AI to build trustworthy systems and ensuring robustness in environments where reliability and risk quantification are paramount.

- **Open Source**: Convinced that open source is essential to democratize access to AI and accelerate technological progress, in addition to reduce dependence on propietary software.
